title: Fix broken link to API docs in README
description: The link to the API documentation in the README was pointing to the old docs.example.com domain which no longer exists. Updated to the new docs.internal.io URL.
diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 5d6e7f8..a9b0c1d 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ pip install -r requirements.txt
 
 ## Documentation
 
-Full API documentation is available at [docs.example.com/api](https://docs.example.com/api).
+Full API documentation is available at [docs.internal.io/api](https://docs.internal.io/api).
 
 ## Contributing
comments: kate: Thanks, the old link was 404'ing.
author: leo
